svg.text: Smoothed spearman is the main neighborhood-synchrony view; raw spearman stays alongside it as the strict per-position check.

color scale: strong negative -> neutral -> strong positive
ranked by |smoothed spearman|, then |raw spearman|; offset uses primary peak start positions
